context_values.response.implement:
Implemented the first approved `chain:runtime` restart slice. The workspace now exposes the chain crates and pins the runtime/common SDK deps in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/Cargo.toml#L1), the dead runtime was replaced with a buildable minimal FRAME runtime in [runtime/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs#L38), and the preserved common types were cleaned up into a real crate in [common/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/common/src/lib.rs#L1) and [common/src/currency.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/common/src/currency.rs#L1). I also wrote the curated lane outputs at [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md#L1), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md#L1), and [integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md#L1).

Verification passed with:
- `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-chain-target cargo check --offline -p myosu-chain-common`
- `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-chain-target cargo check --offline -p myosu-chain`
- `WASM_BUILD_WORKSPACE_HINT="$PWD" CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-chain-target cargo check --offline -p myosu-runtime`
- `WASM_BUILD_WORKSPACE_HINT="$PWD" CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-chain-target cargo build --offline --release -p myosu-runtime`

The release build emitted Wasm artifacts under `/tmp/myosu-chain-target/release/wbuild/myosu-runtime/`. I did not create `quality.md` or `promotion.md` because those are owned by later stages. There were already unrelated dirty files in `crates/myosu-chain/pallets/game-solver/*` and `crates/myosu-tui/*`, and I left them untouched.

context_values.response.fixup:
Replaced the runtime lane’s stub gate in [fabro/checks/chain-runtime-reset.sh](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/fabro/checks/chain-runtime-reset.sh) with the approved Slice 1 proof: it now runs the `myosu-chain-common`, `myosu-chain`, and `myosu-runtime` offline checks, builds `myosu-runtime` in release mode, and asserts the three Wasm artifacts exist. It also forces a writable target dir (`/tmp/myosu-chain-target` by default, overridable with `MYOSU_CHAIN_TARGET_DIR`) so the gate no longer inherits the sandbox’s read-only ambient `CARGO_TARGET_DIR`.

Updated the lane artifacts in [outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md), [outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md), and [outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md) so the executable proof path is the durable source for this slice. I intentionally did not author `quality.md` or `promotion.md`, per the fixup contract.

Verification: `./fabro/checks/chain-runtime-reset.sh` exited `0`. The underlying `cargo check`/`cargo build` commands all passed, and the Wasm artifacts were present at `/tmp/myosu-chain-target/release/wbuild/myosu-runtime/` with the recorded non-zero sizes.
